jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Pfizer India
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
